metadata.title: Abstimmungsdossier Platform
metadata.description: ATProto-based civic-tech platform for Swiss referenda

login.title: Welcome
login.description: We will email you a sign-in link. No password.
login.autoCreateHint: New here? Your account is created automatically.
login.serverError: Server error — please try again later

magicLink.sentTo: Your verification is on its way to
magicLink.otherDevicePrompt: Enter the number shown on the other device:
magicLink.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please request a new link.
magicLink.expiredBody: This sign-in link has expired or was already used.
magicLink.otherDeviceReveal: Opened the link on another device? Enter the code
magicLink.spamHint: Nothing there? Check your spam folder.

home.noBallots: No ballots are currently available. Check back soon!

profile.pseudonymExplanation: Your pseudonym is a randomly chosen Swiss mountain name. It protects your identity and stays the same forever.
profile.verificationSuccess: E-ID verification successful! Your account is now verified.
profile.verificationFailed: E-ID verification failed. Please try again.
profile.pseudonymSource: Your display name is derived from the mountain “{mountain}” – {canton}, {height} m a.s.l.

ballotDetail.noArguments: No arguments have been submitted yet.

errors.auth_required: Your session expired. Please log in again.
errors.pds_unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

argumentDetail.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!

relevance.intro: How much do you agree with this argument? Rate it by moving the slider.

feed.noActivity: No activity yet for this ballot.

review.title: Peer Review
review.submitSuccess: Review submitted. The result will appear once enough reviews are collected.
review.noReviews: No pending reviews. Check back later.

reviewStatus.officialTooltip: This argument was published as-is in the official voting brochure of the Federal Chancellery.

booklet.officialSubtitle: from the Federal Chancellery's ballot booklet
booklet.auswertungPlaceholder: The evaluation will be available soon.

vorlage.comingSoon: This section will be available soon.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The requested page does not exist.

taxonomy.empty: No topic hierarchy exists for this ballot yet.
taxonomy.bandSubtitle: Position and length result from your argument ratings.
taxonomy.panoramaSubtitle: Each topic is a mountain: the peak sits at the average of your ratings, the base width shows the spread, the height shows importance.
taxonomy.panoramaHint: Hover over a mountain for details.
taxonomy.insUnrSub: Rate a few arguments to see what this topic means for you.
taxonomy.insSplitSub: You find arguments on both sides convincing. This is exactly where thinking more carefully pays off most.
taxonomy.insProSub: You rated the arguments in favour of the proposal as more relevant.
taxonomy.insConSub: You rated the arguments against the proposal as more relevant.
taxonomy.insBalSub: Your ratings roughly balance out here.
taxonomy.agree: I see it that way too
taxonomy.disagree: I don't see it that way
taxonomy.rateFirstHint: Please rate at least two of the arguments above first.
taxonomy.rateFirstHintOne: Please rate the argument above first.
taxonomy.analysisSubtitle: What your ratings reveal about your stance on the topics.
taxonomy.analysisLockedDesc: Rate at least two arguments in each topic to unlock your personal analysis.
taxonomy.sunburstSubtitle: Colour and position result from your argument ratings.
taxonomy.sunburstDissentNote: Ambivalent: strong arguments on both sides

argumentarium.title: Topics & arguments on «{name}»
argumentarium.heading: Topics & arguments
argumentarium.intro: Here you'll find the arguments on this proposal, sorted by topic. From the start, the arguments published in the official voting booklet are posted here. The community is invited to contribute arguments of its own. You can rate every argument and discuss it in detail.

verify.diffBody: Enter this code on the device where you started ({email}):
verify.diffWarning: If you did not just start a sign-in somewhere else, do not share this code with anyone and close this page. POLTR will never ask you for this code.
verify.diffFooter: You can close this page afterwards.
verify.wrongDevice: Please complete the sign-in on the device where you started.
verify.diffStartOver: Sign in on this device instead
